papers_mined.title: Great Law of Peace Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: Haudenosaunee constitution circa 1102 CE; 50 chiefs from 6 nations; oldest representative democracy; consensus-based decision making.

papers_mined.title: Government Haudenosaunee Confederacy
papers_mined.note: Grand Council 50 chiefs work to resolve disputes + plan welfare; Clan Mothers + Chiefs + Faithkeepers run confederacy.

papers_mined.title: Great Law of Peace Matriarchy
papers_mined.note: Clan Mother (eldest woman) selects chiefs + monitors performance + can remove if fails to serve; matriarchal supervisor role.

papers_mined.title: Great Law of Peace NY Courts
papers_mined.note: Direct influence on US Constitution + American democracy; consensus + checks and balances + removal mechanism for unfit leaders.
